metadata.title: tasknotes
metadata.description: Note-based task management with calendar, pomodoro and time-tracking integration.

text:"Configure how TaskNotes integrates with your editor and existing Markdown tasks."
regex.target: text:"配置TaskNotes如何与您的编辑器和现有Markdown任务集成。"
text:"内联任务功能如何工作:"

regex.source: text:"Task link overlay: When you link to a task file like [[My Task]], it shows an interactive task card instead of a plain link"
regex.target: text:"任务链接覆盖: 当您链接到任务文件如[[我的任务]]时，它会显示交互式任务卡片而非普通链接"

regex.source: text:'Instant task convert: Shows a "Convert to TaskNote" button next to standard Markdown checkboxes like - [ ] My task'
regex.target: text:'即时任务转换: 在标准Markdown复选框旁显示"转换为TaskNote"按钮，如- [ ] 我的任务'

regex.source: text:"These features help bridge regular Markdown tasks with the full TaskNotes system."
regex.target: text:"这些功能有助于将常规Markdown任务与完整TaskNotes系统连接起来。"

regex.source: text:"Note: {dueDate} and {scheduledDate} are in YYYY-MM-DD format and will be empty if not set."
regex.target: text:"注意: {dueDate}和{scheduledDate}采用YYYY-MM-DD格式，未设置时为空。"
text:"{{details}} - 用户从模态框提供的详细信息"

regex.source: text:"{{parentNote}} - Parent note as a properly formatted markdown link"
regex.target: text:"{{parentNote}} - 父笔记(格式化为Markdown链接)"

regex.source: text:"Configure which event types are visible by default when opening the Advanced Calendar. Users can still toggle these on/off in the calendar view."
regex.target: text:"配置打开高级日历时默认显示哪些事件类型。用户仍可在日历视图中切换这些选项。"

regex.source: text:'Timeblocks are defined in daily note frontmatter using the "timeblocks" field. Each timeblock can have a title, start time, end time, and optional attachments as markdown links to tasks or notes.'
regex.target: text:'时间块在每日笔记的frontmatter中使用"timeblocks"字段定义。每个时间块可以有标题、开始时间、结束时间以及作为Markdown链接到任务或笔记的可选附件。'

regex.source: text:"\u{1F4A1} Tip: In the calendar view, hold Shift + drag to create timeblocks \u2022 Drag to move \u2022 Resize edges to adjust duration"
regex.target: text:"\u{1F4A1} 提示: 在日历视图中，按住Shift+拖动创建时间块 \u2022 拖动移动 \u2022 调整边缘改变时长"

regex.source: text:"Subscribe to external calendar feeds (ICS/iCal format) to display events alongside your tasks."
regex.target: text:"订阅外部日历源(ICS/iCal格式)以在任务旁显示事件。"

regex.source: text:"Google Calendar: Settings \u2192 Calendar settings \u2192 Integrate calendar \u2192 Secret address in iCal format"
regex.target: text:"Google日历: 设置 \u2192 日历设置 \u2192 集成日历 \u2192 iCal格式的秘密地址"

regex.source: text:"Outlook/Office 365: Calendar settings \u2192 Share calendar \u2192 Publish a calendar \u2192 ICS format"
regex.target: text:"Outlook/Office 365: 日历设置 \u2192 共享日历 \u2192 发布日历 \u2192 ICS格式"

regex.source: text:'Other services: Look for "Calendar subscription", "ICS feed", "iCal URL", or "Webcal" options'
regex.target: text:'其他服务: 查找"日历订阅"、"ICS源"、"iCal URL"或"Webcal"选项'

regex.source: text:"Place .ics files anywhere in your vault"
regex.target: text:"将.ics文件放在库中的任何位置"

regex.source: text:"Export from Apple Calendar: File \u2192 Export \u2192 Export as .ics file"
regex.target: text:"从Apple日历导出: 文件 \u2192 导出 \u2192 导出为.ics文件"

regex.source: text:"Export from Google Calendar: Settings \u2192 Export \u2192 Download your data"
regex.target: text:"从Google日历导出：设置 → 导出 → 下载您的数据"

regex.source: text:"Files are automatically watched for changes and refreshed"
regex.target: text:"文件变更会自动监测并刷新"

regex.source: text:'Important: For Google Calendar remote URLs, you must use the "Secret address" (private URL) from your calendar settings. The calendar must be set to "Make available to public" for the secret URL to work.'
regex.target: text:'重要提示：对于Google日历远程URL，您必须使用日历设置中的"秘密地址"(私有URL)。日历必须设置为"公开可用"才能使秘密URL生效。'

regex.source: text:"Note: Only read-only access is supported. You cannot edit calendar events from within TaskNotes."
regex.target: text:"注意：仅支持只读访问。您无法在TaskNotes内编辑日历事件。"

regex.source: text:"Configure various plugin features and display options."
regex.target: text:"配置各种插件功能和显示选项。"

regex.source: text:" TaskNotes will read AND write using these property names. Changing these after creating tasks may cause inconsistencies."
regex.target: text:" TaskNotes将使用这些属性名称进行读写操作。创建任务后更改这些名称可能导致不一致。"

regex.source: text:"Configure which frontmatter properties TaskNotes should use for each field."
regex.target: text:"配置TaskNotes应为每个字段使用哪些frontmatter属性。"

regex.source: text:"Customize the status options available for your tasks. These statuses control the task lifecycle and determine when tasks are considered complete."
regex.target: text:"自定义任务可用的状态选项。这些状态控制任务生命周期并决定何时认为任务已完成。"

regex.source: text:'Value: The internal identifier stored in your task files (e.g., "in-progress")'
regex.target: text:'值：存储在任务文件中的内部标识符(例如"进行中")'

regex.source: text:'Label: The display name shown in the interface (e.g., "In Progress")'
regex.target: text:'标签：界面中显示的名称(例如"进行中")'

regex.source: text:"Color: Visual indicator color for the status dot and badges"
regex.target: text:"颜色：状态点和徽章的视觉指示颜色"

regex.source: text:"Completed: When checked, tasks with this status are considered finished and may be filtered differently"
regex.target: text:"已完成：勾选时，具有此状态的任务被视为已完成，可能会以不同方式筛选"

regex.source: text:"The order below determines the sequence when cycling through statuses by clicking on task status badges."
regex.target: text:"下方顺序决定了通过点击任务状态徽章循环切换状态时的顺序。"

regex.source: text:'Note: You must have at least 2 statuses, and at least one status must be marked as "Completed".'
regex.target: text:'注意：您必须至少有2个状态，且至少一个状态必须标记为"已完成"。'

regex.source: text:"Customize the priority levels available for your tasks. Priority weights determine sorting order and visual hierarchy in your task views."
regex.target: text:"自定义任务可用的优先级级别。优先级权重决定了任务视图中的排序顺序和视觉层次。"

regex.source: text:'Value: The internal identifier stored in your task files (e.g., "high")'
regex.target: text:'值：存储在任务文件中的内部标识符(例如"高")'

regex.source: text:'Display Label: The display name shown in the interface (e.g., "High Priority")'
regex.target: text:'显示标签：界面中显示的名称(例如"高优先级")'

regex.source: text:"Color: Visual indicator color for the priority dot and badges"
regex.target: text:"颜色：优先级点和徽章的视觉指示颜色"

regex.source: text:"Weight: Numeric value for sorting (higher weights appear first in lists)"
regex.target: text:"权重：用于排序的数值(权重越高在列表中越靠前)"

regex.source: text:"Tasks are automatically sorted by priority weight in descending order (highest weight first). Weights can be any positive number."
regex.target: text:"任务会自动按优先级权重降序排序(权重最高的最先显示)。权重可以是任何正数。"

regex.source: text:"Note: You must have at least 1 priority. Higher weights take precedence in sorting and visual hierarchy."
regex.target: text:"注意：您必须至少有1个优先级。权重越高在排序和视觉层次中优先级越高。"

regex.source: text:"This action cannot be undone. The task file will be permanently deleted."
regex.target: text:"此操作无法撤销。任务文件将被永久删除。"

regex.source: text:"Please enter a valid date and time format"
regex.target: text:"请输入有效的日期和时间格式"

regex.source: text:"Failed to update due date. Please try again."
regex.target: text:"更新截止日期失败。请重试。"

regex.source: text:"Failed to update scheduled date. Please try again."
regex.target: text:"更新计划日期失败。请重试。"

regex.source: text:`Are you sure you want to delete the timeblock "${this.timeblock.title}"?`

regex.source: text:"No tasks found for the selected filters."
regex.target: text:"未找到符合筛选条件的任务。"

regex.source: text:"Note indexing has been disabled in settings for better performance. To view notes, enable note indexing in Settings > TaskNotes > General > Performance settings and restart the plugin."
regex.target: text:"为提高性能，笔记索引已在设置中禁用。要查看笔记，请在设置 > TaskNotes > 常规 > 性能设置中启用笔记索引并重启插件。"

regex.source: text:"No notes found for the selected date. Try selecting a different date in the Mini Calendar view or create some notes."
regex.target: text:"未找到所选日期的笔记。尝试在迷你日历视图中选择其他日期或创建一些笔记。"

regex.source: text:"Error loading agenda. Please try refreshing."
regex.target: text:"加载日程出错，请尝试刷新。"

regex.source: text:"No items scheduled for this period."
regex.target: text:"此时间段内无计划项目。"

regex.target: text:"未找到所选时间段内的项目。"

regex.source: text:"TaskNotes has an updated, more powerful recurrence system based on the RFC 5545 standard. This migration will convert your existing recurring tasks to use the new format."
regex.target: text:"TaskNotes已更新基于RFC 5545标准的更强大的重复系统。此迁移将转换您现有的重复任务以使用新格式。"

regex.source: text:"No migration needed! All your tasks are already using the new recurrence format."
regex.target: text:"无需迁移！您的所有任务已使用新的重复格式。"

regex.source: text:"We strongly recommend backing up your vault before proceeding."
regex.target: text:"我们强烈建议在继续操作前备份您的仓库。"

regex.source: text:"The migration will convert your recurrence objects to standardized rrule strings."
regex.target: text:"迁移将把您的重复对象转换为标准化的rrule字符串。"

regex.source: text:"You can continue using your tasks normally after migration."
regex.target: text:"迁移后您可以继续正常使用任务。"

regex.source: text:"The migration is permanent - your legacy recurrence objects will be replaced."
regex.target: text:"迁移是永久性的 - 您的旧版重复对象将被替换。"

regex.source: text:'More powerful recurrence patterns (e.g., "every other Tuesday", "last Friday of the month")'
regex.target: text:'更强大的重复模式(例如"每隔一个周二", "每月最后一个周五")'
text:"改进与日历标准的兼容性"
